stemHtml: Why are indications about the height of the tropopause considered non-essential in flight documentation for flight in the tropics?

options.a: The temperatures of the tropical tropopause are always very low and therefore not important.
options.b: The tropopause is always at the same height.
options.c: The tropopause is generally well above the flight level actually flown.
options.d: The meteorological services are unable to provide such a chart.
